variables.notes: The candidate list does not contain the clearest reported interest-expense row. 'Financial expenses' is too broad and includes FX/derivatives. I selected the exact row from the statement outside the candidate list because it best matches interest expense, but this requires manual review due to the outside-candidate selection and because other interest subcomponents (lease, pension, derivatives) are reported separately. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest expenses according to the effective interest method from interest-bearing liabilities recognized at amortized cost
